name: Fuel Consumption
query:
SELECT

    fc.name AS "Fuel Consumption:Link/Fuel Consumption:180",
    fc.date AS "Date:Date:120",

    fcd.item AS "Item:Link/Item:180",

    fcd.burner_1_qty_consumed AS "Burner 1 Qty:Float:140",
    fcd.burner_2_qty_consumed AS "Burner 2 Qty:Float:140",
    fcd.burner_3_qty_consumed AS "Burner 3 Qty:Float:140",
    fcd.wastage_b01 AS "Wastage 1 Qty:Float:140",
    fcd.wastage_b02 AS "Wastage 2 Qty:Float:140",
    fcd.wastage_b03 AS "Wastage 3 Qty:Float:140",

    fcd.total_consumption AS "Total Consumption:Float:160",

    fcd.start_time AS "Start Time:Time:120",
    fcd.end_time AS "End Time:120",

    fcd.burner_breakdown AS "Burner Breakdown:Time:150",

    fcd.total_working_hour AS "Total Working Hour:Float:160",

    fcd.consumption_per_hour AS "Consumption Per Hour:Float:180"

FROM
    `tabFuel Consumption` fc

LEFT JOIN
    `tabFuel Consumption Detail` fcd
ON
    fcd.parent = fc.name

WHERE
    fc.docstatus < 2

    AND fc.date BETWEEN %(from_date)s
    AND %(to_date)s

ORDER BY
    fc.date DESC,
    fc.name DESC
